title: Manufacturing Engineer - Samsung India Electronics - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Samsung India Electronics - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Samsung India Electronics are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Samsung India Electronics:
Samsung India Electronics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
